priority: Maintained suppaftp-backed FTP client with hermetic loopback coverage
scope: Registered FTP\Connection class and PHP-src FTP constants
suppaftp-backed ftp_connect, ftp_login, ftp_pwd, ftp_chdir, ftp_raw, ftp_close, and ftp_quit covered by hermetic loopback server tests
suppaftp-backed passive ftp_nlist, ftp_rawlist, and ftp_mlsd data-channel reads
suppaftp-backed passive ftp_get, ftp_put, ftp_append, ftp_nb_get, and ftp_nb_put local filename transfers
Control-channel directory, metadata, SITE, ALLO, chmod, rename, delete, and option APIs
Opt-in live endpoint smoke gated by PHRUST_NET_TESTS and PHRUST_FTP_LIVE_* environment variables
Stream-resource transfer functions registered with deterministic gap results
non_scope: Active data channels, local stream resource transfers, and true async transfer progress
next_step: Bridge PHP stream resources into ftp_fget and ftp_fput before promoting stream-transfer PHPTs; enable FTPS only after choosing a TLS backend.
